'''âg-l-b-p''' ('''kagalbepoko''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|transitive verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:coat|coat]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| g-l-b-p
|-
! Word class
| [[Transitive verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:coat|coat]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| âg-l-b-p
|-
! Lemma
| kagalbepoko
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
=== [[Agent]] agreement ===
''[[Patient]] fixed at fourth female singular, telic perfect template.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thigalbepoko|thigalbepoko]] || [[word:jigalbepoko|jigalbepoko]] || [[word:shigalbepoko|shigalbepoko]] || [[word:kigalbepoko|kigalbepoko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthugalbepoko|thuthugalbepoko]] || [[word:jujugalbepoko|jujugalbepoko]] || [[word:shushugalbepoko|shushugalbepoko]] || [[word:kukugalbepoko|kukugalbepoko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thugalbepoko|thugalbepoko]] || [[word:jugalbepoko|jugalbepoko]] || [[word:shugalbepoko|shugalbepoko]] || [[word:kugalbepoko|kugalbepoko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thugalbepoko|thugalbepoko]] || [[word:jugalbepoko|jugalbepoko]] || [[word:shugalbepoko|shugalbepoko]] || [[word:kugalbepoko|kugalbepoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:thegalbepoko|thegalbepoko]] || [[word:jegalbepoko|jegalbepoko]] || [[word:shegalbepoko|shegalbepoko]] || [[word:kegalbepoko|kegalbepoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thothogalbepoko|thothogalbepoko]] || [[word:jojogalbepoko|jojogalbepoko]] || [[word:shoshogalbepoko|shoshogalbepoko]] || [[word:kokogalbepoko|kokogalbepoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thogalbepoko|thogalbepoko]] || [[word:jogalbepoko|jogalbepoko]] || [[word:shogalbepoko|shogalbepoko]] || [[word:kogalbepoko|kogalbepoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thogalbepoko|thogalbepoko]] || [[word:jogalbepoko|jogalbepoko]] || [[word:shogalbepoko|shogalbepoko]] || [[word:kogalbepoko|kogalbepoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:thĂŚgalbepoko|thĂŚgalbepoko]] || [[word:jĂŚgalbepoko|jĂŚgalbepoko]] || [[word:shĂŚgalbepoko|shĂŚgalbepoko]] || [[word:kĂŚgalbepoko|kĂŚgalbepoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thathagalbepoko|thathagalbepoko]] || [[word:jajagalbepoko|jajagalbepoko]] || [[word:shashagalbepoko|shashagalbepoko]] || [[word:kakagalbepoko|kakagalbepoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thagalbepoko|thagalbepoko]] || [[word:jagalbepoko|jagalbepoko]] || [[word:shagalbepoko|shagalbepoko]] || [[word:kagalbepoko|kagalbepoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thagalbepoko|thagalbepoko]] || [[word:jagalbepoko|jagalbepoko]] || [[word:shagalbepoko|shagalbepoko]] || [[word:kagalbepoko|kagalbepoko]]
|}

''[[Agent]] fixed at third male singular, telic perfect template.''

! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
